title: artocarpus lamellosus
intro: Artocarpus lamellosus, also known as the jack fruit tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Moraceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Artocarpus lamellosus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, teas, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
